span.p:
read DB (last 8 h):
adjustment stats . activity distribution
param stats (avg/median/p10/p90)
floor + ceiling % . mode distribution . budget stats

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
diagnose():
floor/ceiling-stuck >80% . activity too low
mode starvation (engaged <1%) . over-engaged >30%
budget full/depleted/throttled . static params

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
compute_adjustments() . max 25 changes:
home_values . safe_floors . caps
curiosity . reversion . budget (once/day)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
save_meta_tuning_review -> DB
(full audit: diagnosis, old->new config)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

svg.text: A7.7 META — meta-review retunes the rules (3x/day)
